description: TinyFusion MVP - Lightweight local AI API gateway with MoA diagnostic, SSE keep-alive, and verify-and-retry oracle

userStories.title: Rust Project Scaffolding
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a well-structured Rust workspace with tinyfusion-core and tinyfusion-gui crates so that the codebase is modular and maintainable.
acceptanceCriteria: Cargo workspace with two member crates: tinyfusion-core and tinyfusion-gui
tinyfusion-core has src/main.rs, src/lib.rs, src/sniffer.rs, src/session.rs, src/moa/, src/keepalive.rs, src/oracle.rs, src/proxy.rs
tinyfusion-gui has standard Tauri v2 structure
cargo check passes with no errors
cargo test passes (no tests yet, just compilation)

userStories.title: Axum HTTP Server Setup
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a basic Axum HTTP server listening on port 9999 so that it can accept incoming API requests.
acceptanceCriteria: Server startup logs to stdout with port number

userStories.title: Config File Loading
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the core to load configuration from ~/.tinyfusion/config.json so that model endpoints and settings are persistent.
acceptanceCriteria: Config schema: port, workers[], judge, executor, workspaces{}
Create default config if file doesn't exist
Parse config with serde_json, return typed struct
Log config load success with model count
cargo test passes with config parsing tests

userStories.title: Tauri App Shell
userStories.description: As a user, I want a Tauri desktop application that opens a window with the TinyFusion GUI so that I can configure and monitor the gateway.
acceptanceCriteria: Tauri v2 app launches with a native window (1200x800 default)
WebView loads index.html from frontend assets
cargo tauri dev launches the app successfully

userStories.title: Sidebar Navigation
userStories.description: As a user, I want a sidebar navigation with Dashboard, Models, Logs, and Settings so that I can navigate between pages.
acceptanceCriteria: Nav items: Dashboard, Models, Logs, Settings (with Lucide icons)
Active item has accent bg + left border indicator
Click navigates to route (React Router or equivalent)
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Chat Completions Request Parsing
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the gateway to parse and validate incoming OpenAI chat completion requests.
acceptanceCriteria: Reject invalid requests with 400 and descriptive error
Return parsed request struct for downstream handling
cargo test passes with request parsing tests

userStories.title: Chat Completions Response Handling
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the gateway to format and return chat completion responses in OpenAI format.
acceptanceCriteria: Returns 200 OK with standard chat completion JSON response
Supports both streaming and non-streaming modes
Response includes: id, object, choices, usage
Streaming: SSE data: events with proper formatting
cargo test passes with response formatting tests

userStories.title: Single Model Passthrough
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the gateway to forward requests to a configured upstream model so that I can verify the proxy chain works.
acceptanceCriteria: Request forwarded to configured upstream endpoint (e.g., Ollama)
Upstream errors forwarded with correct HTTP status
Logging shows request → upstream URL mapping
cargo test passes with mock upstream

userStories.title: SSE Streaming Support
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the gateway to stream SSE responses from upstream so that clients receive tokens in real-time.
acceptanceCriteria: SSE headers emitted correctly (Content-Type: text/event-stream, etc.)
Each upstream chunk forwarded as-is to client
Stream closed when upstream closes connection
cargo test passes with streaming tests

userStories.title: Model Config Page Layout
userStories.description: As a user, I want a Model Configuration page with sections for Workers, Judge, and Executor so that I can organize my AI models by role.
acceptanceCriteria: Each section has header with role name, description, and Add button
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Model Card Display
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see each configured model as a card showing name, status, and endpoint so that I can identify models at a glance.
acceptanceCriteria: Card shows: model name (md, 600 weight), status dot, endpoint URL (mono), API key (masked)
Status dot colors: green (connected), red (error), amber (testing), gray (untested)
Copy URL button with Copied feedback
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Model Card Status States
userStories.description: As a user, I want model cards to visually indicate connection status so that I can quickly identify issues.
acceptanceCriteria: Error: status dot --status-error (red), static, error message below endpoint
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Model Card Actions Menu
userStories.description: As a user, I want actions on model cards (Test, Edit, Delete) so that I can manage models.
acceptanceCriteria: Test secondary button: sends test request, shows spinner
⋯ ghost icon button: dropdown with Edit, Duplicate, Delete
Delete action: confirmation dialog before removal
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add/Edit Model Dialog Structure
userStories.description: As a user, I want a dialog to add or edit a model with provider selection and form fields.
acceptanceCriteria: Provider tabs: Ollama, OpenAI, Anthropic, DeepSeek, Custom
Form fields: Display Name, Endpoint URL, Model ID, API Key (optional)
Test connection after saving checkbox (default: checked)
Save button disabled until all required fields filled
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add/Edit Model Form Validation
userStories.description: As a user, I want form validation to prevent saving invalid model configurations.
acceptanceCriteria: Required fields: Provider, Display Name, Endpoint URL, Model ID
API key warning for non-localhost endpoints
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Connection Testing
userStories.description: As a user, I want to test a model connection so that I can verify it's working before saving.
acceptanceCriteria: Test button sends minimal request to model endpoint
Success: status dot turns green, Connected label
Failure: status dot turns red, error message displayed
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Global Settings Section
userStories.description: As a user, I want global settings for port, retries, timeout, and workspace verification commands.
acceptanceCriteria: Settings fields: Port (number), Max Retries (1-10), Verify Timeout (seconds), Keep Core Running (toggle)
Workspace commands: key-value pairs (path → verify command)
Settings persisted to config file on save
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Dashboard Page Layout
userStories.description: As a user, I want a Dashboard page showing active session cards and a live activity log so that I can monitor gateway activity.
acceptanceCriteria: Layout: session cards grid (top) + live activity log (bottom)
Header: Dashboard title + New Session button
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Session Card Display
userStories.description: As a user, I want session cards showing basic info (state badge, session ID) so that I can identify sessions.
acceptanceCriteria: Card shows: status dot, state badge (Diagnostic/Execution/Verify/Retry/Done), session ID
State colors: green (Diagnostic), blue (Execution), amber (Verify), red (Retry)
Empty state: No Active Sessions with gateway endpoint display
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Session Card Stats Block
userStories.description: As a user, I want session cards to show real-time stats (workers, duration, requests, tokens).
acceptanceCriteria: Stats block: Workers active, Duration, Requests, Tokens
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Session Card Actions and Retry State
userStories.description: As a user, I want session card actions and retry error context.
acceptanceCriteria: End Session ghost-danger button with confirmation dialog
Retry state shows error summary (2 lines max)
Error text: mono font, truncated with ellipsis
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Live Activity Log Entry Rendering
userStories.description: As a user, I want log entries to display timestamp, phase tag, session ID, and message clearly.
acceptanceCriteria: Log entries: timestamp (mono), phase tag, session ID, message
Phase tag colors: green (diag), blue (exec), amber (veri), red (retry), gray (info)
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Live Activity Log Auto-Scroll
userStories.description: As a user, I want the log to auto-scroll to new entries but pause when I scroll up.
acceptanceCriteria: Header: Live Activity + auto-scroll toggle + Clear button
Auto-scroll to bottom (pauses when user scrolls up)
Click indicator or scroll to bottom resumes auto-scroll
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Sequential State Sniffer
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the gateway to detect request state (Diagnostic/Execution) by inspecting message history so that it can route to the correct handler.
acceptanceCriteria: Diagnostic: msg_count <= 2 OR last message contains error keywords (stack trace, compile error, test failed)
cargo test passes with 4+ test cases

userStories.title: Session Manager
userStories.description: As a developer, I want an in-memory session manager that tracks sessions by hash/UUID so that state transitions persist across requests.
acceptanceCriteria: Session identified by: user field, explicit session_id, or hash of first system+user messages
Session struct: id, state, retry_count, messages, created_at
cargo test passes with session creation/lookup tests

userStories.title: State Transition Logic
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the state machine to transition between states based on sniff results and verification outcomes.
acceptanceCriteria: Diagnostic → Execution: when </final_plan> present in history
Execution → Verify: when executor response contains completion marker
Verify → Done: when verify command succeeds (exit 0)
Verify → Diagnostic: when verify fails AND retry_count < max
cargo test passes with transition tests

userStories.title: Worker Concurrent Execution
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the gateway to spawn 2-3 worker model calls in parallel during Diagnostic phase so that multiple models analyze the problem.
acceptanceCriteria: Worker endpoints configured in config file
Collect worker responses (success or timeout error)
cargo test passes with mock workers

userStories.title: Judge System Prompt Construction
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the gateway to construct a structured Judge prompt that requests XML-formatted diagnostic output.
acceptanceCriteria: Judge receives: original prompt + all worker outputs
cargo test passes with prompt construction tests

userStories.title: Judge XML Response Parsing
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the gateway to parse structured XML tags from Judge response.
acceptanceCriteria: Parse XML tags: consensus, contradictions, coverage_gaps, unique_insights, final_plan
Fallback: if XML parsing fails, use raw Judge output
Extract final_plan for state transition detection
cargo test passes with XML parsing tests

userStories.title: MoA Response Aggregation
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the gateway to aggregate worker responses and send them to the Judge so that we get a comprehensive diagnostic.
acceptanceCriteria: Aggregate worker responses into single payload
Include original user prompt in Judge request
Judge response streamed back to client as SSE

userStories.title: SSE Header Emission
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the gateway to emit SSE headers immediately so that clients don't timeout during long computations.
acceptanceCriteria: Headers: Content-Type: text/event-stream, Cache-Control: no-cache, Connection: keep-alive, X-Accel-Buffering: no

userStories.title: Keepalive Comment Injection
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the gateway to send SSE keepalive comments every 15 seconds so that clients stay connected during MoA computation.
acceptanceCriteria: Every 15 seconds of inactivity, send : keepalive\n\n
Keepalive comments are valid SSE (lines starting with : are ignored by parsers)
Keepalive stops when real tokens arrive
cargo test passes with timing tests

userStories.title: Transition to Real Tokens
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the gateway to seamlessly switch from keepalive comments to real tokens so that clients receive data without interruption.
acceptanceCriteria: When Judge produces output, stop keepalive
Stream real tokens as SSE data: events
No gap or delay in transition

userStories.title: Command Execution with Output Capture
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the gateway to run verification commands and capture exit code and output.
acceptanceCriteria: Working directory set to workspace path
Handle timeout (kill process, treat as failure)
cargo test passes with mock command

userStories.title: Error Injection into Messages
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the gateway to inject verification errors back into the messages array so that the next diagnostic cycle can fix them.
acceptanceCriteria: On verify failure, append user message with error output

Message format: Local verification failed with exit code X. Stderr:
```
...
```
Please re-analyze.
Message injected before next Diagnostic phase

userStories.title: Retry Loop Logic
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the gateway to retry failed verifications up to max_retries so that the system can self-correct.
acceptanceCriteria: On verify failure: if retry_count < max, transition to Diagnostic
On verify failure: if retry_count >= max, transition to Done

userStories.title: Logs Page Layout
userStories.description: As a user, I want a Logs page with a filter bar and full log table so that I can investigate gateway activity.
acceptanceCriteria: Layout: filter bar (top) + log table (bottom) + footer
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Log Search Input
userStories.description: As a user, I want to search log messages by text so that I can find relevant entries.
acceptanceCriteria: Full-width search input with magnifying glass icon
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Log Phase and Session Filters
userStories.description: As a user, I want to filter logs by phase and session so that I can narrow down results.
acceptanceCriteria: Phase filter: multi-select dropdown (diag, exec, veri, retry, info)
Session filter: multi-select dropdown with active/recent sessions
Select All / Deselect All quick actions
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Active Filter Indicators
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see active filters as removable pills so that I can manage my filter state.
acceptanceCriteria: Active filters shown as pills below search bar
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Log Entry Table Structure
userStories.description: As a user, I want a log table with properly formatted columns so that I can scan entries efficiently.
acceptanceCriteria: Columns: Timestamp (120px), Phase (64px), Session (120px), Message (flex-1), Actions (40px)
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Log Table Row Interactions
userStories.description: As a user, I want to interact with log rows (hover, click, expand) to see details.
acceptanceCriteria: Hover: background shift + copy icon appears
Click: expands inline detail view with full context
Expanded view shows: Session ID, Request Size, Workers, Judge, Full JSON
Copy JSON and Copy Session ID actions
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Export Functionality
userStories.description: As a user, I want to export filtered logs as JSON, CSV, or plain text so that I can analyze them externally.
acceptanceCriteria: Export dialog with format selection (JSON, CSV, Plain Text)
Downloads file with timestamp in filename
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Light Mode Toggle
userStories.description: As a user, I want to switch between dark and light themes so that I can use my preferred color scheme.
acceptanceCriteria: Theme toggle in sidebar footer (or Settings page)
All components work in both themes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Mobile Responsiveness
userStories.description: As a user, I want the GUI to work on mobile screens with a hamburger menu so that I can access it from any device.
acceptanceCriteria: Sidebar collapses to hamburger menu at <768px
Hamburger opens sidebar as slide-out overlay
Session cards stack vertically on mobile
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Sniffer Unit Tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want unit tests for the state sniffer module so that state detection logic is verified.
acceptanceCriteria: tests/sniffer_test.rs: Error keyword detection (stack trace, compile error, test failed)

userStories.title: Session Manager Unit Tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want unit tests for the session manager module so that session tracking is verified.

userStories.title: MoA Module Unit Tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want unit tests for the MoA module so that worker/judge logic is verified.

userStories.title: Keepalive Module Unit Tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want unit tests for the keepalive module so that SSE streaming is verified.
acceptanceCriteria: tests/keepalive_test.rs: Transition from keepalive to real tokens

userStories.title: Oracle Module Unit Tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want unit tests for the oracle module so that command execution is verified.
acceptanceCriteria: tests/oracle_test.rs: Exit code handling (success vs failure)
tests/oracle_test.rs: Error output injection into messages

userStories.title: Proxy Module Unit Tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want unit tests for the proxy module so that request forwarding is verified.

userStories.title: Integration Tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I want integration tests for full flows so that I can verify end-to-end behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: tests/integration_test.rs: Full Diagnostic → Execution → Verify → Done cycle
Retry loop: Verify fails → Diagnostic → retry until max
SSE stream continuity (no client disconnect during MoA)
